name: forbid(unsafe_code)
description: Zero unsafe blocks — enforced at compile time via #![forbid(unsafe_code)]

name: deny(clippy::unwrap_used)
description: No unwrap() in production code — enforced via clippy lint

name: deny(clippy::expect_used)
description: No expect() in production code — enforced via clippy lint

name: Result<T> everywhere
description: All fallible operations return Result<T>. Never panic.

name: Builder pattern
description: All config structs use builder pattern: XxxConfig with XxxConfigBuilder, chain setters, build() -> Result

name: parking_lot::RwLock
description: Interior mutability via parking_lot::RwLock for L1-L5, L7 modules. Never std::sync::RwLock except L6.

name: std::sync::RwLock for L6
description: L6 consensus modules use std::sync::RwLock to match existing layer convention

name: TensorContributor trait
description: Every module implements TensorContributor (C3 mandatory) for 12D fitness reporting

name: SignalBus emission
description: Cross-layer signals via Arc<SignalBus> (C6). L5 modules CANNOT import L4 EventBus — use L1 SignalBus only.

name: Timestamp newtype
description: Never use chrono::SystemTime directly. Use Timestamp from m1_foundation/shared_types (C5).

name: Owned returns from RwLock
description: Methods returning data through RwLock return OWNED types (C7). .read().get(key).cloned(), never &T.

name: Section separators
description: Use // ============ (80 chars) separators between major sections in source files

name: Module doc headers
description: Every module starts with //! # Mxx: Name, //! ## Layer: Ln, //! ## Dependencies, tensor encoding, traits table

name: FMA for floats
description: Use mul_add() chains for floating-point arithmetic. 0.3f64.mul_add(a, 0.25f64.mul_add(b, 0.2 * c))

name: Lock scoping
description: Explicit drop() or inner scope blocks before acquiring next lock. Never hold two write locks simultaneously.

name: Explicit imports
description: Never glob imports (use crate::*). Always explicit: use crate::module::{Type1, Type2}

name: Doc comments on pub items
description: All public items have /// doc comments. Fallible fns include # Errors section.

name: Backticked identifiers
description: Identifiers in doc comments use backticks: `PaneId`, `m01_core_types` (clippy doc_markdown)

name: 50+ tests per module
description: Every module has 50+ unit tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests at bottom of file

name: Error accumulation
description: Validation collects ALL errors before returning, joins with '; '. Never fail-fast on first error.

name: Newtypes for safety
description: Use newtypes: ModuleId, AgentId, Severity, Timestamp, Duration. Never raw strings/ints for typed concepts.

name: EventBus channel publishing
description: Publish to typed EventBus channels: health, remediation, learning, consensus, integration, metrics, auth, prediction
